titles.en: The meaning of the mud whom Allah prevented to eat
The meaning of the mud whom Allah prevented to eat

segments: : حدثنا سعد بن عبد الله، قال: حدثني أحمد بن أبي عبد الله، قال حدثني المعاذي، عن معمر، عن أبي الحسن عليه السلام قال: قلت له: ما يروي الناس في الطين وكراهته؟ قال: إنما ذاك المبلول وذاك المدر.
arabic.text: : حدثنا سعد بن عبد الله، قال: حدثني أحمد بن أبي عبد الله، قال حدثني المعاذي، عن معمر، عن أبي الحسن عليه السلام قال: قلت له: ما يروي الناس في الطين وكراهته؟ قال: إنما ذاك المبلول وذاك المدر.

segments: 1.	We were told by my father, may Allah grant him mercy, that he said: We were told by Sa’d bin Abdullah, from Ahmad bin Abi Abdillah, that he said: I was told by al-Mu’adhi, from Mu’ammar, from Abu’l-Hasan, peace be upon him, that he said: I said to him: What do the people narrate with regards to mud and the dislike of it? He said: That is only with regards to the moisturized, and that is clay.
en.basel-kadem.text: 1.	We were told by my father, may Allah grant him mercy, that he said: We were told by Sa’d bin Abdullah, from Ahmad bin Abi Abdillah, that he said: I was told by al-Mu’adhi, from Mu’ammar, from Abu’l-Hasan, peace be upon him, that he said: I said to him: What do the people narrate with regards to mud and the dislike of it? He said: That is only with regards to the moisturized, and that is clay.

titles.en: The meaning of the mud whom Allah prevented to eat

segments: : حدثنا محمد بن الحسن الصفار، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد الله.
arabic.text: : حدثنا محمد بن الحسن الصفار، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد الله.

segments: 2.	It was narrated that the Messenger of Allah, Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Family, forbade the eating of clay. I was told of that by Muhammed bin Hasan, may Allah be pleased with him, that he said: We were told by Muhammed bin Hasan al-Saffar, from Ahmad bin Abi Abdillah.
en.basel-kadem.text: 2.	It was narrated that the Messenger of Allah, Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Family, forbade the eating of clay. I was told of that by Muhammed bin Hasan, may Allah be pleased with him, that he said: We were told by Muhammed bin Hasan al-Saffar, from Ahmad bin Abi Abdillah.

narratorChain.raw: وروي أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله نهى عن أكل المدر. حدثني بذلك محمد بن الحسن، - رضي الله عنه - قال

parts.text: وروي أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله نهى
أكل المدر. حدثني بذلك محمد بن الحسن، - رضي الله عنه - قال
